title: Windows calculator desktop app
prompt: Build a standalone Windows desktop calculator app with a clean window, a calculator display, number pad, addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, equals, and clear.

title: Windows notes desktop app
prompt: Build a standalone Windows desktop notes app with a clean window, a title field, a large notes editor, a save button, and a small saved-notes list.

title: Invoice follow-up desktop workspace
prompt: Create a Windows desktop workspace for invoice follow-ups with a sidebar, overdue invoices list, owner filters, status changes, and a clear add-invoice action.

title: Batch file renamer desktop tool
prompt: Create a standalone Windows desktop file renamer with a folder picker, filename preview list, replace-text inputs, and a clear rename action.

title: Inventory manager desktop app
prompt: Build a standalone Windows desktop inventory manager with a sidebar, product list, stock status filters, quantity updates, and a clear add-item action.

title: PDF combiner desktop utility
prompt: Create a Windows desktop PDF combiner utility with a file list, move-up and move-down controls, a merge button, and a visible output path field.

title: Expense tracker desktop app
prompt: Build a standalone Windows desktop expense tracker with a sidebar, add-expense form, category filter, saved expense list, and a visible totals summary.

title: Shop record reporting desktop app
prompt: Build a standalone Windows desktop shop record software for a small store. I want to enter only daily records, and the app should automatically generate summary views for daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, and yearly performance. Include a clear daily entry form, a saved records list, totals, and report sections that update from those entries.

title: Local CRM desktop workspace
prompt: Create a standalone Windows desktop CRM workspace with a sidebar, customer list, follow-up status filters, a details panel, and a clear add-customer action.
